name: Airbnb PDF Card Generator
description: Turn any Airbnb listing into a clean, printable A4 summary card.
author: Enzo Barone

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://*.muscache.com https://*.airbnb.com https://*.airbnb.it data:; connect-src https://server.arcgisonline.com;
